text: Phillies Fire Rob Thomson, Name Don Mattingly Interim Manager - MLB Trade Rumors
fullText: The Phillies become the second underperforming playoff hopeful to fire their manager. MLB Trade Rumors has the latest out of Philadelphia.

text: Soldier accused of betting on Maduro raid, winning $400,000, pleads not guilty - CNN
fullText: A special forces soldier involved in the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro pleaded not guilty Tuesday to misusing classified information about the operation to make over $400,000 in illegal profits.

text: Federal, state officials execute search warrants at daycare providers in Twin Cities - MPR News

text: S&P 500 slips from record, Nasdaq falls as OpenAI report knocks chip stocks: Live updates - CNBC
fullText: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite fell on Tuesday, weighed down by a report that pointed to weakness in OpenAI as well as a rise in oil prices.

text: Friends of USF victims remember them as family away from home, say they're 'shocked' by killings - NBC News
fullText: Friends of University of South Florida victims Nahida Bristy and Zamil Limon remembered the doctoral students as their family away from home and say they are "shocked" by their deaths.

text: UAE to leave OPEC amid Hormuz oil crisis, a blow to Saudi Arabia - The Washington Post

text: FCC plans to challenge ABC station licenses amid Kimmel controversy - CNN

text: 'He began to cry, and almost fell to the floor': The fluffy fossil that finally showed the world that birds are dinosaurs - Live Science
